args: apt-get update   && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends bash ca-certificates curl git   && curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_24.x | bash -   && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends nodejs

set -e
  corepack enable
  yarn --version
  yarn config set --home enableTelemetry 0
gem uninstall -aIx bundler   && gem install bundler -v ${BUNDLER_VERSION}   && bundle install --jobs 4 --retry 3

organization.description: Collection of portable apps for Windows
